title: Crash when using order by in Table Expression
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_order_by_crash (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value REAL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, name, value FROM test_order_by_crash WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY value DESC) AS subquery ORDER BY id ASC;
key_bug_features: Crash when using order by in Table Expression
